titleStmt.title: SII 24.111: original edition by H. K. Narasimhaswamy
No. 111. (A.R. No. 127 of 1947-48.) III PRĀKĀRA, WEST WALL.

summary.p: Registers an assignment of tax-free land to Rāmadēvaṉ Śrīrāma Bhaṭṭaṉ, the tārkkāṇi of Iḷavēḷūr for providing offerings on specified occasions; the land endowed was to be called Śrīrāmaviḷāgam. The record is dated in the 3rd year of the king's reign.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī . pūmālai miṭaintu pon mālai tikaḻtarap pāmālai malinta parumaṇit tiraḷ puyat tirunilamaṭantaiyoṭu jeyamakaḷiruppat tanvarai mārvan tanatenappeṟṟu tirumakaḷorutani Iruppak kalaimakaḷ coṟṟiṟam
puṇarnta kaṟpiṉaḷāki viruppoṭu nāvakattiruppa ticaitorun tikiṟiyoṭu ceṅkol naṭappa Akilapuvaṉamuḻutuṅ kavippator putumatipol veṇkuṭai mimicai niḻaṟṟak karuṅkali Oḷittu van pilattiṭaik kiṭappak kuḷattiṭai
t teluṅkaviman vilaṅkal mimicai Eṟavuṅ kaliṅka pūmiyaik kaṉaleri parukavum Ayampaṭaip paruvattu vempaṭai tāṅkiyum veṅkai maṇṭalat tāṅkinitiruntu vaṭaticaiyaṭippaṭuttaruḷit tenṟicait tarumamum tavamum tānamun
taḻaippa vetamum nītiyum memmaiyum Ātiyukam pol talai ciṟappa vantaruḷi vilaṅkarum por puliyāṉai pāttipar cūṭa niṟaimaṇi makuṭam muṟaimaiyil cūṭi mannuyirkkellām minnuyirttāy pol tanoḷi parappit tanittani parattu maṇmuḻutu
kaḷippa manuneṟi vaḷattu tankoyiṟ koṟṟavāyiṟ puṟattu maṇināveṭuṅka muracukaḷ muḻaṅka vicaiyamum puka(ḻ)ḻum menmel Oṅka ceḻiyar veñcuram pukacceralar kaṭalpuka Aḻitaru ciṅkaṇar Añci neñcalamarak kaṅkar tiraiyiṭak kannalar ve
nniṭak koṅka rotuṅka koṅkaṇar cāya maṟṟetticai mannarum tamtamakkaraṇena t tirumalaṟ cevaṭi Urimaiyil Iṟaiñcat tollai Eḻulakamu toḻateḻat tonṟiya mullai vāṇakai mukkokkiḻānaṭi Umaiyoṭucaṅkaran Imaiya yattiruntananenap po
ruṉti Uṭaṉiruppa Āṅkavaṉ makiḻuṅ kaṅkaiyoppākit terivaiyir tilatam tiyākapatākai purikuḻal maṭantai punita kuṇavanitai(y) tiripuvanamuḻutuṭaiyāḷ Avan=tiru vuḷḷattaruḷ muḻutuṭaiyāḷeṉa vīrasiṅhāsanattu mukkokkiḻānaṭika(ḷ)ḷoṭum vīṟṟirun
taruḷiya kopparakecarivanmarāna tiripuvaṉaccakkaravattikaḷ śrīvikkiramacoḻadevaṟkku yāṇṭu 3Āvatu śrī kāriyam(m) vicaiyālaiya viḻupparaiyar Evaṟpaṭi śrī vaiṣṇava vāriyam vayiṣṇavanampiyum Irāyūr tiru nampiyum tiruvāy
ppāṭi tāsarum perumpaṟṟappuliyūr śrīcaṭakopatāsarum tiruvaraṅkamāḷi nampiyum śrīpaṇṭāravāriyam Āritan Ārāvamutu puṇṭarīkaṉum pāratāyan cirākava Ārāvamutum ciṅkan tiruvaraṅkanārāyaṇanum pāratāyan keruṭavākaṉanum tiruvaraṅkanārāya
ṇanum pāratāyaṉ paṭṭan vaṭakopuramuṭaiyānum koyil kaṇakkuraiyaṉSome letters of this name are omitted. Ampalak kūttan Āna tiruvaraṅkappiriyanum Ārāvamutu Aṟivariyān Āna śrīvaiṣṇavappiriyarum Uḷḷiṭṭa Āḻvār kaṇmikaḷom vaṭakarai tiyākavalli vaḷa nāṭṭup poykai nāṭṭu brammadeyam keṇṭarātitta caturve
timaṅkalattu śrīkavijeṉakaṟpakacceri Iḷaveḷūrt tārkkāṇi Irāmatevaṉ cirāmapaṭṭanukku nāṅkaḷ viṟṟukkuṭutta nilamāvatu Āḻvār tirumaṭaipaḷḷippuṟamāka ṇark kuṭippālaka Iṭṭu tu
samvatsarattin Uṟdeśam payiṟ ceyya Uṇṇātu pāḻāyk kiṭan=ta nilattu nāṅka ḷivanukku viṟṟuk kuṭutta nilattukku Icaitta kiḻpāṟkellai Uttamacoḻa perāṟṟukku meṟkum tenpāṟkellai Ālaṅkuṭi nilattu
kku vaṭakkum melpāṟ kellai kāraikkuṭi nilattukkuk kiḻakkum vaṭapāṟkellai koṅkapperuvaḻikkut teṟkum Āka Ivvicain=ta perunān colaiyuḷḷakappaṭṭa nilam veli Innilam veliyum Ivan tanakku nanṟāka Iraṇṭu tiru
nāḷilum Iraṇṭān tiruṉāḷkaḷil Aḻakiya maṇavāḷapperumāḷukku Ēkā ttirumañcanamum mukkalavariciyāl peruntiruvamutum Amāvāsippaṭi Ā navamutum Amutu ceyyakkaṭavaṉākavum Āṭṭaittiru tiruvātirai
nāḷ paḷḷikoṇṭaruḷukiṟa periya perumāḷukku kalavariciyil tirupponakap paṇṭai yile paṭaittu Amutu ceyyak kaṭavaṉākavum Innilam velikkum nila veli Onṟukkuk kācu Āka vanta kācu Onṟu Āḻ
vār śrīpaṇṭāratte Oṭukkit taravu koḷḷak kaṭavāṉākavum Innilan tiruttaṟat tirutti tiruttaṟṟa nilattukku puncey varicai veli Onṟukkup paḷḷikoṇṭān marakkālāl Eṇkalamāka van=ta nellu
śrīpaṇṭāratte Aḷaṉtu Itil mikutikoṇṭu Iraṇṭu tirunā(ḷ)ḷilum Iraṇṭāṉ tirunāḷkkaḷ Ēkātecittirumañcaṉamum mukkala Ariciyāl peruṉ tiruvamutum Amāvāsi Appamutum Amutu ceytaruḷa mārkaḻit tiruvātirai nāḷil
paḷḷikoṇṭaruḷukiṟa periya perumāḷukku kalavariciyāl tiruppoṉakappaṇṭai yile paṭaittu Amutu ceyvikkaikkum śrīpaṇṭārattukkācu Oṭukkum paṭiye Āṭṭāṇṭu torum kācu Oṭukki Amutu cey(va)vikka kaṭavanākavum Innilattukku kurampu
ceṉnir veṭṭi Allatu maṟṟepperppaṭṭuRead ṭa for ṭu •tutu is written above the line. m ceyyakkaṭavāṉallātānāka vum Innilam śrīrāmaviḷākam Aim poṉ tiraḷ tiruccuṟṟumā(ḷi) ḷikaiyile kallu veṭṭikkoṇṭu Ivviḷākam Ivanukkāka Āritan puṇṭarikan Ārāvamutu Ivan vaṟkattā
rumey kaykkoṇṭu cantirātittavaṟ celuttak kaṭavarākavum Ippaṭi sammatittu Innilam viṟṟuk kuṭuttom vaṭakarait tiyākavalli vaḷanāṭṭup poykai nāṭṭu brahmateyam śrīkaṇṭarātittac caturveti maṅ
kalattu śrīkavijanakaṟpakacceri Iḷaveḷūrt tārkkāṇi Irāmatevan śrīrāma paṭṭanukku Āḻvār kanmikaḷom Ippaṭikku koviṟ kaṇakku Āritan Ampalak kūttaṉāṉa tiruvaraṅkappiriya neḻuttu Ippaṭikku Āḻvār koyiṟ
kaṇakku śrīvayiṣṇa(ṇa)van(n) Ārāvamutu Aṟivariyāṉāna śrīvayiṣṇavapiriya neḻuttu Ippaṭikku Irāyūrt tirunāṭuṭaiyā neḻuttu Ippaṭikku tiruvāy Ippaṭikku ṣṇanampi Eḻuttu Ippaṭikku
caṭakopadāsareḻuttu kuṇṭurppaḷḷikoṇṭān paṭṭaneḻuttu Ippaṭikku sutasā t tiruvaraṅkamāḷinampi Eḻuttu Ippaṭikku Āritan Ārāvamutu puṇṭarika neḻuttu Ippaṭikku kāciyapan ciṅkan tiru
raṅkanārāyaṇa neḻuttu Ippaṭikku pāratāyan cirāman Ārāvamutineḻuttu Ippaṭikku pāratāyan ciriḷaṅko neḻuttu Ippaṭikku pāratāyan Ananta paṭṭan vaṭakopuramuṭaiyān Eḻuttu śrīvayiṣṇavarakṣai ...
Digital edition of SII 24.111 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
